most code files stay under 300 LOC
copy-code advisory classes found: 18 (advisory only, no score impact)

findings.problem: `Security and supply-chain posture` scored 80 below the standard floor of 85
findings.agent_fix: wire secret, dependency, provenance, and workflow scans into an operational CI lane

findings.problem: `Build speed signals` scored 30 below the standard floor of 85
findings.agent_fix: add fast deterministic build/test targets, caches, and narrow proof lanes for agent iteration
